title: hebe stricta
intro: Hebe stricta, also known as the 'Marlborough bellflower', is a flowering plant species native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Hebe stricta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
